page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.r9i family. It is equipped with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C physical cores operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance features a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, meaning hyperthreading is not active, providing dedicated physical execution resources per vCPU. It is provisioned with 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring reliance on network-attached block storage for persistent data. It also lacks any integrated GPU hardware accelerators. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 36 Gbps, managed via a KVM hypervisor. The absence of local storage and GPU resources represents a clear tradeoff, focusing the hardware profile entirely on high-capacity memory and dedicated CPU execution.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.r9i.32xlarge offers high resource density for memory-bound applications that do not require GPU acceleration or local high-speed scratch disks. The dedicated physical core allocation ensures consistent compute performance without noisy-neighbor interference. This profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data-processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.32xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 6982P-C physical cores running at 3.2 GHz. Configured with a single thread per core, it provides dedicated execution resources alongside 1024.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 36 Gbps. It does not contain local storage or GPU accelerators, representing a tradeoff that prioritizes memory capacity and dedicated compute over local disk I/O and hardware acceleration. This configuration is engineered for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, and complex data processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9i.32xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon cores at 3.2 GHz, 1024 GB of RAM, and 36 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale database workloads.
